title: modelharness chart values
description: Schema for charts/modelharness. Validates the harness-level inputs.

namespace.description: Workload namespace that owns the shared resources. Empty falls back to .Release.Namespace.

manageNamespace.description: Whether the chart renders the workload Namespace object (only when installed into a management namespace distinct from the workload namespace).

gatewayName.description: Per-namespace Istio Gateway resource name. Empty derives '<namespace>-gw'.

gatewayClassName.description: GatewayClass the per-namespace Gateway binds to. MUST be non-empty.

serviceAccount.description: Streaming ServiceAccount configuration for KAITO model-streaming pods. Rendered only when workloadIdentityClientId is non-empty.

workloadIdentityClientId.description: User-assigned managed identity (UAMI) client-id GUID. Non-empty renders the streaming ServiceAccount annotated with azure.workload.identity/client-id. Empty (default) renders no ServiceAccount.

gatewayPort.description: HTTP listener port on the Gateway.

enabled.description: Toggles the per-namespace API-key authentication artifacts (APIKey CR + ext_authz EnvoyFilter).

apiKeyName.description: Name of the APIKey CR rendered when auth.enabled is true.

extAuthz.description: Wiring for the cluster-wide apikey-authz ext_authz gRPC service that the per-namespace EnvoyFilter targets.

serviceName.description: Name of the apikey-authz gRPC Service.

serviceNamespace.description: Namespace the apikey-authz gRPC Service runs in.

grpcPort.description: gRPC port of the apikey-authz Service.

timeout.description: gRPC call timeout for the ext_authz check (e.g. '5s').

operation.description: How ext_authz is inserted into the gateway HTTP filter chain.

metadataContextNamespaces.description: Envoy filter metadata namespaces forwarded to the ext_authz server.

enabled.description: Toggles the per-namespace CiliumNetworkPolicy locking down East-West ingress to inference workloads.

allowedIngressNamespaces.description: Optional allowlist of namespaces granted cross-namespace ingress to the inference pods. An empty list keeps strict same-namespace isolation. Each entry MUST be a non-empty namespace name; a namespace that does not exist simply matches no endpoints and is silently skipped.

cloudprovider.description: Cloud provider gate. When empty (default), templates/gateway.yaml renders and templates/azure/* is skipped. When "azure", templates/gateway.yaml is skipped and templates/azure/* render the Azure variants (Gateway with default-domain HTTPS listener + ReferenceGrant).

azure.description: Azure-specific values consumed by templates/azure/*. Ignored unless cloudprovider="azure".

defaultDomain.description: Consumer-side wiring for the cluster-wide AKS App-Routing default-domain TLS Secret rendered by charts/productionstack. When cloudprovider=azure, templates/azure/gateway.yaml adds an HTTPS listener with hostname '<namespace>.<zoneName>' + cross-namespace certificateRefs, and templates/azure/referencegrant.yaml renders a ReferenceGrant into secretRef.namespace authorising the cross-namespace ref.

zoneName.description: Cluster's AKS-issued default-domain zone (without the '*.' prefix). Required when cloudprovider=azure — template renders `fail` otherwise. Fetch from `az aks show ... --query 'ingressProfile.webAppRouting.defaultDomain.domainName'`.

secretRef.description: Cross-namespace reference to the shared TLS Secret. MUST match productionstack's `azure.defaultDomain.secretName` (name) and the DDC's namespace (default: kube-system).
